title: FreeFallMod
description: Adds two new ways of falling: Free fall and Dive
body:
### This Mod adds the two modes of falling from the mod Sky Lands:
- Freefall which slows falling speed
- Dive which makes you fall 4 times faster

In both modes the falling speed is constant 

Press R to go into Freefall
and Shift while in Freefall to Dive

**DO NOT USE THIS MOD WITH SKY LANDS INSTALLED**
